name: op-remote
description: Remote 1Password secret access with Telegram approval for AI agents

telegram_bot_token.title: Telegram Bot Token
telegram_bot_token.description: Telegram bot token for sending approval requests

telegram_chat_id.title: Telegram Chat ID
telegram_chat_id.description: Telegram chat ID where approval requests are sent

telegram_approver_ids.title: Telegram Approver IDs
telegram_approver_ids.description: Comma-separated Telegram user IDs allowed to approve (optional)

timeout.title: Approval Timeout
timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for approval requests (default: 120)
